rqs: What are the time, space, and stability differences between QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort, and Parallel Sorting versus Insertion, Bubble, Selection, Shell, and Naive sorts in academic journals?
Which intervention sorting algorithms provide better scalability and throughput than classic sorts on high‑performance computing and embedded devices according to benchmark suites?
In which contexts (academic journals, conference proceedings, open‑source repositories) are parallel sorting algorithms reported to outperform traditional sorts in throughput?
base_query: ("Software Developers" OR "Algorithm Researchers" OR "Data Processing Systems" OR "Embedded Devices" OR "High Performance Computing" OR "researcher") AND ("QuickSort" OR "MergeSort" OR "HeapSort" OR "Radix Sort" OR "Parallel Sorting") AND ("Insertion Sort" OR "Bubble Sort" OR "Selection Sort" OR "Shell Sort" OR "Naive Sorting") AND ("Time Complexity" OR "Space Complexity" OR "Stability" OR "Scalability" OR "Throughput") AND ("Academic Journals" OR "Conference Proceedings" OR "Open Source Repositories" OR "Benchmark Suites" OR "Industry Reports")
arxiv_query: (all:"Software Developers" OR all:"Algorithm Researchers" OR all:"Data Processing Systems" OR all:"Embedded Devices" OR all:"High Performance Computing" OR all:"researcher") AND (all:"QuickSort" OR all:"MergeSort" OR all:"HeapSort" OR all:"Radix Sort" OR all:"Parallel Sorting") AND (all:"Insertion Sort" OR all:"Bubble Sort" OR all:"Selection Sort" OR all:"Shell Sort" OR all:"Naive Sorting") AND (all:"Time Complexity" OR all:"Space Complexity" OR all:"Stability" OR all:"Scalability" OR all:"Throughput") AND (all:"Academic Journals" OR all:"Conference Proceedings" OR all:"Open Source Repositories" OR all:"Benchmark Suites" OR all:"Industry Reports")

questions.text: Is the algorithm implementation described in sufficient detail to reproduce results?
Are experimental settings (hardware, datasets, benchmarks) fully reported?
Does the study use statistically sound methods to compare sorting performance?
Are limitations and threats to validity explicitly discussed?
Is the study focused on contexts relevant to the PICOC (e.g., HPC, embedded, benchmarks)?
